benefits.description: Used to help heal injury; planning to use post-surgery for faster recovery

protocol_notes: Lyophilized powder stored in freezer since summer, moved to fridge a few days before reconstitution. Reconstituted at room temperature with bacteriostatic water. First use was after initial injury; this is second cycle post-surgery (approximately 2 weeks post-op). Reported successful reconstitution with no clumping.
